The '''Duel on Balowa''' was one of the last battles of the [[New Sith Wars]]. It was fought on [[Balowa]], between [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Kaox Krul]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Crian Maru]] and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Dree Vandap]]. All three were killed in battle.<ref name="Darkness Shared" />
